## Problem

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the command-line option, output, or workflow behavior you would like.

## Alternatives considered

Are there existing tools or PlainMap options that partly solve this?

## Relevance to PlainMap scope

PlainMap focuses on preprocessing, mapping, duplicate handling, BAM generation, optional unmapped-read export, optional mapDamage, and summary statistics. Briefly explain how this feature fits that scope.
